short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $0.65B in FY2026 Q1, +2.2% YoY — decelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $3.20B (+392.3% vs current Q) — set by 22 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $2.85.
Next earnings: 2026-06-19 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $2B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $12B → FY2 $13B (+6.6% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 14.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
6-quarter run-rate CAGR: +14.2% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Consumer Discretionary): Premiumization vs trade-down split — the long-run thesis depends on cohort mix.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

MACD: -0.01 vs signal -0.73 — bullish crossover.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · positioning window)
bullets: Price $203.51 vs SMA200 $196.03 (+3.8%) — long-term trend is in **uptrend intact**.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 30.0% — normal.
Put/Call OI: 1.43 — put-heavy hedging (institutions defensive).
30-day implied move: ±8.2% ($186.88 – $220.14) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -1.42pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $180.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Calendar spread at $204 strike: short 30 DTE / long 60 DTE. Mid IV, range-bound → harvest near-term theta while keeping back-month optionality.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 32.8% across 6 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 6 dates spanning 119–609 DTE.
210-day implied move: ±25.0% ($152.72 – $254.30) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $195 (-4.2% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Flat term structure (+2.8pp) — no near-term event premium; long-dated vol fairly priced.
long_term.strategy: Long 1-year ATM straddle at $204. Low IV (30%) + range-bound → buy volatility cheap ahead of a 12-month catalyst window; profits if move >±30%.
